name: TeeTime
address: 520 E Broadway St Old, Webb City, MO 64870
about: TeeTime is a climate-controlled driving range and outdoor pickleball facility in Webb City, MO, that also functions as a full-service sports bar and restaurant. It features 19 bays equipped with TopTracer technology, a system that allows players to track their shot distance, height, and ball speed. The venue offers a range of activities including golf, pickleball, and yard games like cornhole, with amenities such as indoor and outdoor dining and large TVs for game days. Pricing is structured per person or per bay, with a one-time lifetime registration fee required for all users.
why_golfers_like_it: Climate-controlled bays allow for play in any weather
TopTracer technology provides detailed shot data and virtual golf games
Convenient location on historic Route 66 in the Joplin region
All-in-one venue offering golf, dining, and other entertainment options

food_and_drink.notes: Full bar menu with bites and shareables available

simulator_hardware.notes: The driving range is powered by TopTracer, the leader in ball tracking technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, you can bring your own clubs if you have them. Clubs are also available in all bays, including left and right-handed options for men, women, and juniors.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not allowed. The venue offers a full bar and restaurant for guests.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: This information is not provided in the content.

faq.question: Is TeeTime kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, TeeTime is kid-friendly. Each bay is equipped with junior clubs for kids under 13, and the venue welcomes families.
